commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds shared stale auto-fallback-origin detection, defers reply cleanup until the run boundary, prepares direct agent-command attempts without stale fallback auth, and adds regression coverage for reply and agent-command model selection.

PR surface: Source +178, Tests +275. Total +453 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked issue is source-reproducible on current main, and the PR finding is also source-reproducible by following a stale auto-fallback session through mixed inline model directive persistence before the new deferred cleanup call.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow PR-branch repair can guard the deferred cleanup write and add the missing regression without a product decision.

target.title: Fix stale auto-fallback origin model selection
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds a shared stale auto-fallback origin classifier so reply and agent-command selection agree when recorded fallback origin no longer matches the current primary.
- Defers reply-side model/auth cleanup until after read-only slash/inline actions have dispatched and a real run is about to start.
- Prepares agent-command attempts with stale fallback model/auth cleared in memory, then persists durable cleanup only after a successful visible run and only if the store row still matches the stale fallback pin.

## Maintainer feedback addressed
- One prepared selection result now carries reset reason and persistence behavior through the reply turn.
- Stale-origin repair no longer emits the disallowed-allowlist reset event.
- Preserve-state/non-mutating agent-command runs strip fallback auth for the primary attempt without writing durable cleanup.
- Durable cleanup is guarded against concurrent user model switches.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: stale auto-fallback model pins whose recorded fallback origin no longer matches the current primary were being treated as active stored overrides; the fix prepares the primary selection for the next real run and defers durable cleanup until the run boundary.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout on branch `codex/92776-prepared-model-selection-boundary`, commit `30bd429052`, running the patched runtime module through Node 24 with `tsx` from the repository dependencies.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: ran `node --import tsx --input-type=module` from the repository root and imported `createModelSelectionState` plus `isStaleAutoFallbackOriginOverride` from the patched source, using a throwaway session entry that matched a stale auto-fallback origin (`anthropic/claude-3-5-sonnet-latest` recorded from old `openai/gpt-4.1`, current primary `openai/gpt-4.1-mini`).
- Evidence after fix (screenshot, recording, terminal capture, console output, redacted runtime log, linked artifact, or copied live output): copied terminal output from the live Node command:

```json
{
  "proof": "stale-auto-fallback-origin-boundary",
  "staleBefore": true,
  "before": {
    "selected": "anthropic/claude-3-5-sonnet-latest",
    "origin": "openai/gpt-4.1",
    "authProfileOverride": "fallback-auth-profile"
  },
  "during": {
    "preparedSelection": "openai/gpt-4.1-mini",
    "resetModelOverride": true,
    "resetModelOverrideReason": "stale-auto-fallback-origin",
    "storeStillPinnedBeforePersist": "anthropic/claude-3-5-sonnet-latest",
    "authStillPinnedBeforePersist": "fallback-auth-profile"
  },
  "after": {
    "persisted": true,
    "providerOverride": null,
    "modelOverride": null,
    "modelOverrideSource": null,
    "fallbackOriginProvider": null,
    "fallbackOriginModel": null,
    "authProfileOverride": null,
    "authProfileOverrideSource": null
  }
}
```

- Observed result after fix: the prepared reply selection uses the current primary `openai/gpt-4.1-mini` while the durable session row remains pinned before persistence, then `persistModelOverrideReset()` clears the stale model override, stale fallback origin, and fallback auth fields together.
- What was not tested: no live external provider API call was sent; this proof exercises the local OpenClaw model-selection runtime and session mutation boundary.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: the proof uses a redacted throwaway session entry to avoid publishing real auth profile names.
- Before evidence (optional but encouraged): maintainer feedback on #92790 identified that the old cleanup was scattered before this prepared-selection boundary existed.

## Verification
- node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/model-selection.test.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts
- pnpm tsgo:core
- pnpm tsgo:test:src
- pnpm lint:core
- CI=1 pnpm check:changed -- --base upstream/main --head HEAD
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/auto-fallback-stale-origin.ts src/agents/agent-command.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/model-selection.ts src/auto-reply/reply/model-selection.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-directives.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-directives-apply.ts

Fixes #92776
Supersedes #92790
target.author: turbotheturtle

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
